name: devutils-sdks
description: Production-grade SDKs for DevUtils API - Screenshot, PDF, Reader, and more
author: DevUtils

scripts.build:all: npm run build:js && npm run build:python && npm run build:cdn
scripts.build:python: cd sdk-python && python -m build 2>/dev/null || echo 'Python SDK build skipped (Python not installed)'
scripts.test:all: npm run test:js && npm run test:cdn && npm run test:python
scripts.test:python: cd sdk-python && pytest 2>/dev/null || echo 'Python tests skipped'
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=sdk-js && npm run lint --workspace=cdn
scripts.format: npm run format --workspace=sdk-js && npm run format --workspace=cdn
